title: Well-Tempered Quartet — piece list
description: Array of string quartet candidates, one per piece, grouped conceptually by key. Generated from some_quartets_by_key.xlsx via xlsx_to_json.py.

sharps.description: Number of sharps in the key signature (negative = flats). Range −7 … +7.

key.description: Tonal centre as spelled in the source spreadsheet, e.g. 'C', 'F-sharp', 'B-flat', 'D-flat'. May use enharmonic spellings; canonical WTC names are resolved in the dashboard.

composer.description: Composer's surname (and initial where needed for disambiguation).

piece.description: Opus number, catalogue number, or short title. Empty string when not yet determined ('tbd' is normalised away).

notes.description: Free-text commentary on tonality, fugal content, caveats, etc.
examples: in F but has D♭ major 2nd mvt

scoreUrl.description: URL to a score (typically IMSLP). Empty string when not available.

ytUrl.description: URL to a YouTube recording or score-video. Empty string when not available.

status.description: Editorial status, derived from cell background colour in the source spreadsheet. 'candidate' = primary selection; 'uncertain' = tonality or content questionable; 'alternate' = backup option; 'rejected' = struck from consideration.
